response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS and Docker — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. His open-source contributions and architectural versatility demonstrate strong engineering judgment and alignment with enterprise tooling needs.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and internal tooling development experience
Strong open-source contributions and testing/DevOps infrastructure expertise
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume (though likely implied)
German language skill is only basic, may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
Some roles are outdated or freelance; recent focus at re:cinq is most relevant
